name_en: Bottega Veneta New Bowling Bag: What can it hold? Have you guys got the new bowling bag? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ Stylishness is not reduced at all, combining BV's classic weaving elements, and it can fit a laptop
name_cn:
Bottega Veneta New Bowling Bag: What can it hold? Have you guys got the new bowling bag? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ Stylishness is not reduced at all, combining BV's classic weaving elements, and it can fit a laptop
Adjustable shoulder strap length
Suitable for tall girls to carry
Boys look sunny when carrying it too ☀️
Style No.: 730327
Dimensions: 28*21*16
